title: In-school support units
body: "This research covers the use of:   pupil support units (PSUs) internal or in-school alternative provision (IAP) other models of in-school support units   With a growing number of mainstream schools using in-school support units, this research was conducted to better understand the wide variety of models, uses and perceived outcomes of this type of provision.  "

taxons.title: Alternative provision and pupil referral units
